lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows moderate wear on the interior and exterior. While the car is functional, some mechanical components may require maintenance or repair in the near future.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver for anyone prioritizing utility over aesthetics. While mechanically sound and regularly serviced, the exterior shows noticeable wear consistent with its age, including several scratches along the passenger side and a small dent on the rear bumper. Inside, the upholstery shows some staining and typical wear on the driver’s seat. It has been a reliable car for commuting, though it does have these cosmetic imperfections that are reflected in the price.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior shows some scratches and minor dents. The interior has visible wear on the seats and carpet. Mechanical systems are operational but will require routine maintenance.

Get ready to hit the road in this dependable workhorse! This car is a solid runner that’s always ready to go when you are. While it shows some honest signs of use and could use a little cosmetic attention, it remains a reliable choice for anyone looking for a vehicle with plenty of heart and character. It’s a great value for a car that still has so much to offer!

This vehicle is in fair condition and is being sold as-is. While it remains a reliable daily driver, it shows clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, a small dent on the rear passenger door, and some paint fading on the hood. Inside, the upholstery is worn with some staining on the carpets, though all electronics are currently functional. Mechanically, the car runs and drives well, but it will likely need new brake pads and a set of tires in the near future. It’s a solid option for someone looking for a functional vehicle who doesn't mind some cosmetic imperfections.
Fair condition.

We are pleased to offer this exemplary vehicle, presented in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, this automobile exhibits no discernible wear, representing a rare opportunity for the most discerning of buyers. Its flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity establish it as a definitive benchmark for the model. This is, without reservation, a peerless acquisition for those who prioritize uncompromising quality.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, keeping it pampered and garage-kept. You won't find a single scratch or hiccup here. It's ready for a new home and many more adventures. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! 😊
Offering a mechanically superlative E46 M3, preserved in collector-grade condition. This specimen features the S54 3.2L power plant, recently
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title in hand.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been meticulously preserved in true showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero paint chips, swirl marks, or door dings; it has been stored under a breathable cover in a climate-controlled garage since original purchase. Inside, the cabin remains pristine, still retaining that distinct new-car scent. The premium leather upholstery is supple and entirely free of creases or wear, while the high-gloss interior trim and dashboard are flawless. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. I have maintained a comprehensive binder containing every service record, all performed strictly at the authorized dealership ahead of schedule. The engine bay is immaculate, and the vehicle sits on a fresh set of high-performance tires with near-total tread life remaining. This car has never been driven in inclement weather, and the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. For the buyer who demands perfection and a complete history, this vehicle stands as a benchmark for the model.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, the exterior reflects its original showroom luster, while the interior remains in an unblemished state. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its debut. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly superlative example of the marque.

This exceptional vehicle presents in showroom condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that borders on the obsessive. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier example of the marque. Discerning collectors will appreciate the uncompromising preservation and mechanical integrity of this peerless automobile.

Hey there! I am so excited to find a new home for this absolute gem! It is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it has been kept spotless inside and out. You have really got to see it in person to appreciate how perfect it is! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Offered is a museum-quality E46 M3, featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and optimized double-VANOS timing. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe, a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox, and a factory variable M-differential for peak torque vectoring. The suspension is meticulously sorted with upgraded bushings and Bilstein dampers, ensuring razor-sharp turn-in. Finished in flawless Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the chassis shows no signs of oxidative wear or mechanical fatigue. Proactive maintenance includes rod
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Service records complete. Pristine interior.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous care and enthusiast ownership. This car remains in showroom condition, having been exclusively garage-kept and shielded from the elements. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, and has been treated with a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather bolsters show no signs of creasing, the carpets are spotless, and the 'new car' scent lingers. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a complete, documented service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule. The engine bay is detailed to a high standard, reflecting a history of gentle use and zero leaks. This is a collector-grade example that drives with the same tightness and responsiveness as the day it was first delivered. Included are all original manuals, two master keys, and a folder of service receipts. A rare opportunity for the buyer who demands perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine condition, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies the most discerning collector. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior detail has been preserved to an exacting degree, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. We invite you to acquire a vehicle that defines excellence through its impeccable preservation and mechanical integrity.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, maintained in impeccable, showroom-standard condition. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, representing the pinnacle of its class through rigorous preservation and fastidious maintenance. An acquisition of this caliber offers a rare opportunity for the discerning motorist to secure a vehicle of uncompromising quality and mechanical integrity.

Hey folks! 🚗 I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total dream! It's honestly in pristine, showroom condition—not a single blemish to be found. I've babied this car from day one, and it still has that 'brand new' feel every time you get behind the wheel. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one! Come say hi and take a look!

Offering a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six and a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox. This specimen boasts a documented rod bearing service and a fully addressed VANOS system, ensuring the valvetrain operates with factory-spec urgency. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, benefiting from proactive subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension geometry featuring Bilstein B6 dampers. Every mechanical component, from the limited-slip differential to the individual throttle bodies, has been maintained to an exacting standard. Finished in original paint with a flawless undercarriage, this is a concours-ready example for the serious collector.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included. Original paint and interior.

This vehicle is a pristine example of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior features a flawless factory finish with a deep, mirror-like gloss, entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows no signs of wear, while every electronic component and luxury feature functions exactly as it did the day it left the dealership. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented full service history with all preventive maintenance performed ahead of schedule. It drives tight, quiet, and powerful, offering a 'new car' experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. This is truly a turn-key investment for someone seeking the finest specimen available on the market.

Presented in peerless, showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every surface, from the lustrous exterior finish to the meticulously curated interior, reflects an uncompromising standard of care. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of investment-grade quality, delivering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery state.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly immaculate specimen. Rigorous inspections will confirm its status as a benchmark example of the model.

Hey there! Honestly, I’m so excited for whoever gets to drive this beauty next! 🚗 It’s in absolutely pristine, mint condition—I’ve babied it from day one and it still looks and feels brand new. You won’t find a single scratch or speck of dust anywhere! It’s a total dream to drive and I’m sure you’ll fall in love with it the second you see it. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 represents a masterclass in naturally aspirated performance. The S54 inline-six engine has been fastidiously maintained, featuring a proactive rod bearing service and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul to ensure optimal variable valve timing. Power is managed via a tactile Getrag six-speed manual gearbox and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. The chassis is structurally reinforced at the subframe mounting points and benefits from an upgraded suspension geometry for superior lateral grip. With its original factory finish and a cabin devoid of bolster wear, this vehicle offers an uncompromised mechanical and aesthetic experience for the serious collector.
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless interior and exterior. Full service records included.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that truly defies its age. Meticulously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled garage, this car presents in absolute showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of any wear, still carrying that distinct new-car aroma. Every button, switch, and electronic feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; it has been serviced exclusively at the dealership with a comprehensive log of every oil change and inspection. The engine bay is spotless, and the undercarriage shows no signs of road salt or debris. This isn't just a used car; it's a collector-grade specimen for the most discerning buyer who refuses to compromise. Included are all original manuals, two sets of keys, and a custom-fitted car cover.

Presented in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. Meticulously maintained and free of any cosmetic or mechanical imperfections, it offers an uncompromising ownership experience for the most discerning driver. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of automotive excellence, preserved to the highest standards of quality.
